description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, dressed in a sleeveless athletic tank top and fitted athletic pants. The figure has a full beard and mustache, and his hair is styled back in a slicked, medium-length fashion. He is wearing athletic sneakers, and his arms are slightly bent and relaxed at his sides. The overall appearance suggests he is ready for physical activity or exercise, with a confident and upright posture. The clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing the figure's physique, and there are no visible accessories or carried items.
description: A muscular adult male in athletic wear, standing upright with arms relaxed, featuring a beard and slicked-back hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular build, facial hair, and sleeveless tank top with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the slicked-back hairstyle, and the fitted nature of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tank top, the hairstyle from behind, and the back of the athletic pants and sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm position, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic tank top and fitted athletic pants
